gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, as a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; furthermore, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders; moreover, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders; moreover, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; also, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, with alumni volunteers sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, with alumni volunteers sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station.

Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, with alumni volunteers sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station.
